Project Overview

A Mixed-Use
Community Catalyst

Next Up Development proposes a transformative mixed-use development at the intersection of Union Avenue and South McLean Boulevard in Memphis's Midtown district — a designated Memphis 3.0 anchor zone and city-backed strategic growth area.

The project delivers 126 mixed-income residential units (30% affordable), approximately 15,000 SF of street-level retail including coffee, restaurant, yoga, and salon tenants, 10 artist studios with a gallery, and 157 structured parking spaces across 2.05 acres of infill land.

Anchored by a strong public-private capital structure leveraging LIHTC credits and a PILOT agreement, the development addresses a critical housing shortage while seeding long-term creative economy growth in Midtown Memphis.

Market Analysis

Addressing a Critical Gap

Market Need

Significant housing shortage across both market-rate and affordable segments in Midtown Memphis

Limited retail that drives consistent foot traffic and activates street life along Union Ave corridor

Artists and creatives lack accessible studio and gallery space near established cultural districts

Memphis 3.0 strategic plan identifies this corridor as a priority investment zone

Our Solution

126 mixed-income units with 30% set aside as affordable at 50–80% AMI levels

Ground-floor retail curated for daily needs: coffee, restaurant, yoga studio, hair salon

10 artist studios plus a public art gallery fostering a creative community anchor

Comparable market rents at $2.66 blended PSF (market) supported by Madison @ McLean comps

Community Impact

150+ construction jobs with city and county certified minority and women business enterprise contracting requirements

20+ permanent jobs created through retail and property management operations

100% renewable energy commitment reduces operating costs and environmental footprint

Catalytic investment positioning Midtown for long-term neighborhood appreciation

Conceptual Renderings

The Vision in Detail

Renderings by Elena Rodriguez. The development comprises three distinct buildings — a primary mixed-use tower with residential above ground-floor retail, and two boutique commercial buildings housing the salon & yoga studio and art gallery with artist lofts.

Project Timeline

Path to Completion

Jan 1, 2027
Land Acquisition
Close on three parcels at Union Ave & S. McLean. Total acquisition: $1,750,000 across 80,586 SF.
Jan–Jun 2027
Pre-Development & Due Diligence
5-month period covering entitlements, design finalization, financing close, and construction mobilization.
Jun 2027–Dec 2028
Construction
18-month construction phase. Senior C-Perm loan funds at 60% average draw. 150+ local construction jobs.
Jan 2029–Dec 2030
Lease-Up & Stabilization
Market units absorb at 7.3/month; affordable at 3.2/month. Full stabilization achieved by Dec 31, 2030.
2029–2036
Operations & Value Creation
NOI grows from $2.02M (2029) to $2.71M (2036) at 3% annual rent growth across all asset classes.
Dec 31, 2036
Disposition
Project sale at projected $42.9M gross proceeds. Net sale proceeds to equity: $40.9M. Projected site value: $49.4M.
